hook: Confidence is easier to protect when you build it on repetition rather than outcome.
body: If your self-view depends on every response going your way, dating will always feel destabilizing.

hook: Outcome-based men avoid reps, then wonder why every interaction feels loaded.
body: Measure success partly by whether you showed up cleanly, clearly, and respectfully.

hook: Measure success partly by whether you showed up cleanly, clearly, and respectfully.
body: A solid approach or honest invite can still be a win even if it does not turn into immediate chemistry.

hook: A solid approach or honest invite can still be a win even if it does not turn into immediate chemistry.
body: Track your reps, not just your wins: starts, invites, dates, follow-through, and how calm you stayed.
